0.response: {"Q0":"For selecting between the 2 space missions, I initially was focused on doing it until I realized that the quantity of missions is so high, that actively focusing and selecting each one wouldn't benefit that much compared to freeing up that focus. It selects randomly between the two anyways. For the mining, I just mined whenever I should."}

7.response: {"Q0":"I stopped picking them because there were too many choices, so my decision wouldn't matter that much. At the end of the day, it just comes down to luck with 0 guarantees. Even the worst option would have about 10% chance of winning."}

1.response: {"Q0":"I was initially doing the space missions, but stopped when I realized it was pretty futile."}

8.response: {"Q0":"Galaxies would require more focus because of the fast timer, but I stopped picking them due to it requiring too much effort for possibly no reward. So, by my strategy, visiting planets would require more focus by default."}

3.response: {"Q0":"It was the blue planet that left."}

4.response: {"Q0":"Yes, meteor shower time meant clicking only red and green gems value would go down. Also, don't mine the blue planet."}
